name: Vinaigrette Pasta Salad with Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine oil, lemon juice, pesto sauce, egg yolk, seasoned salt, and white pepper.
2. Whisk together until well blended. Reserve 1/4 cup of the mixture.
3. Broil chicken breast halves on both sides until tender. Slice chicken crosswise into strips about 1 inch wide.
4. Toss remaining oil mixture with hot cooked, drained pasta and zucchini.
5. Arrange on a serving platter. Place chicken slices over pasta; sprinkle with pine nuts.
6. Pour reserved oil mixture over salad. Serve immediately or chill.
